description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.17 Docker image. Define two stages: build and test, and a global before_script that runs apt-get -qq update and installs libmagic-dev libpng-dev libjpeg-dev libtiff-dev libheif-dev. In the build stage add a build job that executes go build ./... . In the test stage add a test job that runs test -z "$(gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr)" to ensure formatting, then go test ./..., downloads and installs golangci-lint v1.43.0 via curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/golangci/golangci-lint/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b $(go env GOPATH)/bin v1.43.0, and finally runs golangci-lint run -v. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
